sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 91

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 91:1
items.html:
(to the question) Zion
The discernment of the inner Yesod of the Nukva, sealed from the twenty-seven letters of Ima, is called by the name Zion. (Item 71)
